name: Daily Research Briefing
description: Weekdays at 9:00 AM - Monitor Reddit communities (r/Peptides, r/Biohackers, r/Nootropics), check competitor websites, identify product opportunities, assess sprint progress, flag blocked tasks

name: Weekly Financial Briefing
description: Mondays at 8:00 AM - Read financial data from Google Sheet (READ-ONLY), analyze cash position, runway, payables due, inventory alerts, revenue trends vs targets

name: Mission Control Maintenance
description: Daily at 11:00 PM - Update all Mission Control dashboards with current data: tasks statuses, product evaluations, cron schedule, business context from BRAND_CATALOG.md, recent peptide research findings. Git commit and push to trigger Vercel deployment.
deliverables: Git push to trigger Vercel deployment

name: Midday Operations Check
description: Daily at 12:00 PM - Brief check for critical issues: cash position alerts, low inventory warnings, overdue payables, blocked tasks stuck 3+ days. Only reports if issues found, otherwise sends '✅ MIDDAY CHECK: All systems normal'
deliverables: Critical issue alerts or all-clear confirmation

name: Weekly Compliance Sweep
description: Fridays at 3:00 PM - Scan elixserpeptides.com for compliance violations. Check against COMPLIANCE.md rules: no human dosing instructions, no 'use this to heal' language, no before/after testimonials, research-only framing. Generate compliance report with any violations found.

name: Weekly Intelligence Brief
description: Fridays at 4:00 PM - Compile weekly learning from all team members, strategic insights, recommended actions, new opportunities identified, risks to monitor. Synthesize week's research, competitive intel, consumer insights into actionable intelligence.

name: Weekly Revenue Dashboard
description: Mondays - Rex (CRO) compiles revenue dashboard for both brands combined: revenue vs target, key metrics (AOV, LTV, CAC, conversion), pipeline health, week-over-week trends

name: DTC Metrics Dashboard
description: Mondays - Drake (VP DTC) reports Elixser DTC performance: AOV, LTV, CAC, conversion rates, email revenue, funnel performance, Amazon sales

name: B2B Pipeline Report
description: Mondays - Blair (VP B2B) reports Parlay wholesale pipeline: prospects by stage, stage movement, close rate, revenue projections, outreach activity

name: Content Production Plan
description: Mondays - Sage (Content) outlines week's content production: digital products in progress, email sequences being written, landing pages, social content, other deliverables
